name: FastSimError
description: Base class for every fastsim-specific error.

name: FastSimValueError
description: A configuration/lookup error (bad block, connection, event, or operation).

name: InvalidBlockParameterError
description: A block constructor was given an invalid parameter (bad LUT table, a

name: PortConnectionError
description: A connection references a port alias that does not exist on the block.

name: SolverError
description: Base class for numerical solver failures.

name: ConvergenceError
description: The implicit solver's inner Newton/fixed-point iteration did not converge.

name: AlgebraicLoopError
description: An algebraic (feedthrough) loop did not converge.

name: StepSizeError
description: The adaptive step controller required a step below ``dt_min``.

name: SingularJacobianError
description: A singular Jacobian was encountered during an implicit solve.

name: TruncatedTrajectoryError
description: Integration stopped before the requested end time (e.g. step floor hit).

name: FastSimWarning
description: Base class for every fastsim-specific warning.

description: A run completed but a convergence subsystem reported a problem: an

description: Plot recorded data with interactive legend picking.

name: ADC
description: Models an ideal Analog-to-Digital Converter (ADC).

name: Abs
description: Absolute value operator block.

name: Adder
description: Summs / adds up all input signals to a single output signal (MISO)

name: Alias
description: Signal alias / pass-through block.

name: AllpassFilter
description: Direct implementation of a first order allpass filter, or a cascade

name: Amplifier
description: Amplifies the input signal by multiplication with a constant gain term.

name: AntiWindupPID
description: Proportional-Integral-Differentiation (PID) controller with anti-windup mechanism (back-calculation).

name: Atan
description: Arctangent operator block.

name: Atan2
description: Two-argument arctangent block.

name: Backlash
description: Backlash (mechanical play) element.

name: ButterworthBandpassFilter
description: Direct implementation of a bandpass butterworth filter block.

name: ButterworthBandstopFilter
description: Direct implementation of a bandstop butterworth filter block.

name: ButterworthHighpassFilter
description: Direct implementation of a high pass butterworth filter block.

name: ButterworthLowpassFilter
description: Direct implementation of a low pass butterworth filter block.

name: ChirpPhaseNoiseSource
description: Chirp source, sinusoid with frequency ramp up and ramp down, plus phase noise.

name: ChirpSource
description: Alias for ChirpPhaseNoiseSource.

name: Clip
description: Clipping/saturation operator block.

name: Clock
description: Alias for ClockSource.

name: ClockSource
description: Discrete time clock source block.

name: CoSimulationFMU
description: CoSimulationFMU block

name: Comparator
description: Comparator block that sets output depending on predefined thresholds for the input.

name: Constant
description: Produces a constant output signal (SISO).

name: Cos
description: Cosine operator block.

name: Cosh
description: Hyperbolic cosine operator block.

name: Counter
description: Counts the number of detected bidirectional threshold crossings.

name: CounterDown
description: Counts the number of detected unidirectional (hi->lo) threshold crossings.

name: CounterUp
description: Counts the number of detected unidirectional (lo->hi) threshold crossings.

name: DAC
description: Models an ideal Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC).

name: Deadband
description: Deadband (dead zone) element.

name: Delay
description: Delays the input signal by a time constant 'tau' in seconds.

name: Differentiator
description: Differentiates the input signal.

name: DiscreteDerivative
description: Discrete-time backward-difference derivative.

name: DiscreteIntegrator
description: Discrete-time integrator (forward Euler).

name: DiscreteStateSpace
description: Discrete-time MIMO state space block.

name: DiscreteTransferFunction
description: Discrete-time SISO transfer function in numerator/denominator form.

name: Divider
description: Multiplies and divides input signals (MISO).

name: DynamicalFunction
description: Arbitrary MIMO time and input dependent function block.

name: DynamicalSystem
description: This block implements a nonlinear dynamical system / nonlinear state space model.

name: Equal
description: Equality comparison block.

name: Exp
description: Exponential operator block.

name: FIR
description: Discrete-time Finite-Impulse-Response (FIR) filter.

name: FirstOrderHold
description: First-order hold reconstructor.

name: FullyImplicitDAE
description: Fully-implicit DAE block.

name: Function
description: Arbitrary MIMO function block, defined by a function or `lambda` expression.

name: GaussianPulseSource
description: Source block that generates a gaussian pulse

name: GreaterThan
description: Greater-than comparison block.

name: Integrator
description: Integrates the input signal.

name: LUT1D
description: One-dimensional lookup table with linear interpolation functionality.

name: LeadLag
description: Lead-Lag compensator.

name: LessThan
description: Less-than comparison block.

name: Log
description: Natural logarithm operator block.

name: Log10
description: Base-10 logarithm operator block.

name: LogicAnd
description: Logical AND block.

name: LogicNot
description: Logical NOT block.

name: LogicOr
description: Logical OR block.

name: MassMatrixDAE
description: Mass-matrix DAE block.

name: Matrix
description: Linear matrix operation (matrix-vector product).

name: Mod
description: Modulo operator block.

name: ModelExchangeFMU
description: ModelExchangeFMU block

name: Multiplier
description: Multiplies all signals from all input ports (MISO).

name: Norm
description: Vector norm operator block.

name: ODE
description: Ordinary differential equation (ODE) defined by its right hand side function.

name: PID
description: Proportional-Integral-Differentiation (PID) controller.

name: PT1
description: First-order lag element (PT1).

name: PT2
description: Second-order lag element (PT2).

name: PinkNoise
description: Pink noise (1/f noise) source using the Voss-McCartney algorithm.

name: Polynomial
description: Polynomial operator block.

name: Pow
description: Raise to power operator block.

name: PowProd
description: Power-Product operator block.

name: Pulse
description: Alias for PulseSource.

name: PulseSource
description: Generates a periodic pulse waveform with defined rise and fall times.

name: RandomNumberGenerator
description: Generates a random output value using `numpy.random.rand`.

name: RateLimiter
description: Rate limiter block that limits the rate of change of a signal.

name: Relay
description: Relay block with hysteresis (Schmitt trigger).

name: Rescale
description: Linear rescaling / mapping block.

name: SampleHold
description: Zero-order hold: samples the input periodically and holds it at the output.

name: SemiExplicitDAE
description: Semi-explicit Index-1 DAE block.

name: Sin
description: Sine operator block.

name: Sinh
description: Hyperbolic sine operator block.

name: SinusoidalPhaseNoiseSource
description: Sinusoidal source with cumulative and white phase noise.

name: SinusoidalSource
description: Source block that generates a sinusoid wave

name: Source
description: Source that produces an arbitrary time dependent output defined by `func` (callable).

name: Sqrt
description: Square root operator block.

name: SquareWaveSource
description: Discrete time square wave source.

name: StateSpace
description: Linear time invariant (LTI) multi input multi output (MIMO) state space model.

name: Step
description: Alias for StepSource.

name: StepSource
description: Discrete time unit step (or multi step) source block.

name: Switch
description: Switch block that selects between its inputs.

name: Tan
description: Tangent operator block.

name: Tanh
description: Hyperbolic tangent operator block.

name: TappedDelay
description: Tapped delay line.

name: TransferFunction
description: Alias for TransferFunctionPRC.

name: TransferFunctionNumDen
description: This block defines a LTI (SISO) transfer function.

name: TransferFunctionPRC
description: This block defines a LTI (MIMO for pole residue) transfer function.

name: TransferFunctionZPG
description: This block defines a LTI (SISO) transfer function.

name: TriangleWaveSource
description: Source block that generates an analog triangle wave

name: WhiteNoise
description: White noise source with Gaussian distribution.

name: Wrapper
description: Wrapper block for discrete implementation and external code integration.

name: ZeroOrderHold
description: Zero-order hold: samples the input periodically and holds it at the output.

name: ZeroCrossing
description: Event that triggers when an event function crosses zero in either

name: ZeroCrossingUp
description: Event that triggers only on an upward (negative-to-positive) zero

name: ZeroCrossingDown
description: Event that triggers only on a downward (positive-to-negative) zero

name: Schedule
description: Event that triggers on a periodic time schedule (a fixed start time and

name: ScheduleList
description: Event that triggers at an explicit list of scheduled times, invoking its

name: Condition
description: Event that triggers when a user-supplied boolean condition becomes true,

name: jit
description: Trace and compile a Python function to optimised Rust IR.

name: jacobian
description: Compute the Jacobian of a Python function via symbolic AD.

name: SSPRK22
description: Strong Stability Preserving Runge-Kutta, 2 stages, 2nd order (Heun).

name: SSPRK33
description: Strong Stability Preserving Runge-Kutta, 3 stages, 3rd order (Shu-Osher).

name: SSPRK34
description: Strong Stability Preserving Runge-Kutta, 4 stages, 3rd order, with an enlarged stability region.

name: RK4
description: Classic Runge-Kutta, 4 stages, 4th order.

name: EUF
description: Explicit (forward) Euler, 1st order. The simplest explicit integrator; fixed step, non-stiff.

name: EUB
description: Implicit (backward) Euler, 1st order. L-stable, fixed step; a robust choice for stiff problems.

name: RKF21
description: Runge-Kutta-Fehlberg embedded pair, orders 2 and 1, for adaptive step-size control.

name: RKBS32
description: Bogacki-Shampine embedded pair, orders 3 and 2 (the method behind MATLAB's ode23).

name: RKF45
description: Runge-Kutta-Fehlberg embedded pair, orders 4 and 5, for adaptive step-size control.

name: RKCK54
description: Cash-Karp embedded Runge-Kutta pair, orders 5 and 4, for adaptive step-size control.

name: RKDP54
description: Dormand-Prince embedded Runge-Kutta pair, orders 5 and 4 (the method behind MATLAB's ode45).

name: RKV65
description: Verner embedded Runge-Kutta pair, orders 6 and 5, for adaptive step-size control.

name: RKF78
description: Runge-Kutta-Fehlberg embedded pair, orders 7 and 8, for adaptive step-size control.

name: RKDP87
description: Dormand-Prince embedded Runge-Kutta pair, orders 8 and 7, for adaptive step-size control.

name: DIRK2
description: Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta, 2nd order.

name: DIRK3
description: Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta, 3rd order. L-stable, for stiff problems.

name: ESDIRK4
description: Explicit-first-stage Singly Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta, 4th order.

name: ESDIRK32
description: Explicit-first-stage Singly Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta embedded pair, orders 3 and 2, for adaptive step-size control.

name: ESDIRK43
description: Explicit-first-stage Singly Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta embedded pair, orders 4 and 3, for adaptive step-size control.

name: ESDIRK54
description: Explicit-first-stage Singly Diagonally Implicit Runge-Kutta embedded pair, orders 5 and 4, for adaptive step-size control.

name: GEAR52A
description: Gear-type backward differentiation formula (BDF) with adaptive order (up to 5) and adaptive step size.

name: SteadyState
description: Steady-state (DC operating point) solver.
